name: Cow Chip Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 cups Milk (or canned milk, cut to half-strength with water)
Cow chips (optional, depending on wind direction)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together all dry ingredients.
2. Cut in lard until flaky pieces form.
3. Add milk to moisten the mix until sticky.
4. Turn dough onto a floured board.
5. Pat gently until the dough is 1/2 inch thick.
6. Cut biscuits from the dough.
7. Place biscuits in a large (18-20") greased, warm Dutch oven (do not crowd).
8. Replace the cover of the Dutch oven and place coals on top.
9. Bake for approximately 20 minutes.
10. Serve with honey or preserves or beans or chili.
11. Makes approximately 18 biscuits.
